codeReview.summary: The feature adds a single evidence artifact with strong local run data and branch-protection snapshots, but it does not provide verifiable same-revision remote gate evidence for the stated end-state claim. The artifact asserts final required-check readiness as configured/green while the referenced revision cannot be resolved via GitHub API, leaving the merge-check proof incomplete.

issues.description: Artifact-level claim is anchored to revision 756ec61..., but that SHA is not resolvable through GitHub check-runs API (422: No commit found), so the report does not prove required-check end-state for the same revision in remote merge-gate context. This leaves VAL-GATE-004/VAL-GATE-006 end-state evidence incomplete.

branchProtectionAssessment.requiredChecksConfigured is set true based on configured context names, but the artifact does not include a same-revision check-run identity cross-check (or run URLs/IDs) to prove those required contexts are actively produced by CI for the referenced revision.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ci-gate-worker procedure does not explicitly require validating required check context names against check-runs for the exact revision used in final evidence before marking end-state configured.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ci-gate-worker/SKILL.md step 5 is generic; transcript shows check-runs queried on SHA df737447... (names: build/test/lint-frontend/lint-python) while final artifact anchors to 756ec61... with required contexts lint/vitest/pytest/playwright.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission/shared guidance lacks a standard that final validation artifacts must include immutable remote evidence pointers (e.g., check-run IDs/URLs tied to the asserted SHA), which weakens auditability of end-state gate claims.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md and .factory/library/* define gate goals but do not define artifact metadata conventions for same-SHA remote proof; this artifact contains summaries and branch protection snapshot only.

summary: Fail: evidence quality is close but not sufficient for final end-state confidence-gate proof because same-revision remote required-check validation is not established for the SHA recorded in the artifact.
